title: melica scaberrima
intro: Melica scaberrima, also known as rough melick or rough melick grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the grass family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melica scaberrima include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Melica scaberrima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, with its dried roots and leaves being the primary sources for herbal preparations.
